name: zomato-menu-manager
description: Zomato Menu Manager — monorepo with Next.js frontend and Python/FastAPI backend

scripts.dev: npx concurrently --names "NEXT,API,WORKER" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:bg-worker"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 1001
scripts.dev:bg-worker: cd backend && uv run python -m app.workers.menu_worker
